VS Code Breakpoint Tools: VS Code Debug Tools for Copilot
List all VS Code breakpoints in the curr: List all VS Code breakpoints in the current workspace and return a stable key for each item.
Add a source breakpoint for a file path: Add a source breakpoint for a file path and line number. Line and column values are 1-based.
Add a function breakpoint for a function: Add a function breakpoint for a function name. Function name is required and breakpoint properties use the same 1-based and optional condition rules as source breakpoints.
Remove a breakpoint by its stable key or: Remove a breakpoint by its stable key or by source file path and line number. Line and column values are 1-based.
Remove a breakpoint by its stable key, b: Remove a breakpoint by its stable key, by source file path and line number, or by function name. Line and column values are 1-based.
Enable or disable a breakpoint by its st: Enable or disable a breakpoint by its stable key or by source file path and line number. Line and column values are 1-based.
Enable or disable a breakpoint by its stable key, by source file path and line number, or by function name. Line and column values are 1-based.
Remove every breakpoint currently regist: Remove every breakpoint currently registered in VS Code.
Enable or disable every source breakpoin: Enable or disable every source breakpoint in a specific file.
List all source breakpoints in a specifi: List all source breakpoints in a specific file and return their snapshots.
Summarize the current breakpoint set wit: Summarize the current breakpoint set with totals and per-kind counts.
List the currently known debug sessions: List the currently known debug sessions and return their session ids.
List the threads known by a selected deb: List the threads known by a selected debug session and return their thread ids.
Failed to restart the selected debug ses: Failed to restart the selected debug session.
Update an existing breakpoint's enabled: Update an existing breakpoint's enabled state, condition, hit condition, or log message without changing its location or function name. Line and column values are 1-based.

Search breakpoints by query text, kind,: Search breakpoints by query text, kind, or enabled state and return matching breakpoint snapshots.
